raw_consumer_statement: I was planning a trip to XXXX, XXXX when XXXX and leg problems developed I went to primary doctor on XX/XX/XXXX who gave me meds for pain and inflammation After a week I still was in pain and hardly could walk I went to XXXX XXXX XXXX to see orthopedist My trip was XX/XX/XXXX return XX/XX/XXXX I received a NOT FIT TO FLY from hospital and primary doctor No flying due to ongoing physical Therapy to mid XXXX Attached is NOT FIT TO FLY certificate XXXX was travel platform I bought ticket after asking me to wait and month and then they extended to possible 3 months for airline to respond (! ) This is like COVID days where airlines wanted " long float, interest free loan '' for tickets held
